title: account_statuses returns private/direct posts without auth
description: GET /api/v1/accounts/:id/statuses (api.rs:1046) has no authentication and no visibility filter in its SQL queries. All posts including visibility='private' and visibility='direct' are returned to any caller. The endpoint should: (1) omit direct/private posts for unauthenticated callers, (2) omit private posts for authenticated callers who don't follow the account.
